name: tasky.extract
description: Read a Gmail thread OR Granola meeting payload, extract candidate action items via Butterbase AI Gateway (Opus 4.7). Emits a list of ExtractedItem structures for the judge pipeline.

nodes.description: Depending on source, assemble the transcript/summary string, sender info, attendee list, etc. so the extractor prompt has clean structured input.
Parse the LLM's strict-JSON response. Attach source_ref (gmail_thread_id or granola_meeting_id) to each candidate. Tag each item with _llm_call_id from the ai node's response for later trace joins.
